name: English Toffee Bars
recipeInstructions:
Heat oven to 350°F. In a large bowl, combine butter, flour and brown sugar. With a pastry blender or fork, cut in butter until fine crumbs form (a few large crumbs may remain). Press into an ungreased 13x9x2-inch baking pan. Sprinkle pecans over crust. Prepare Toffee Topping; drizzle evenly over pecans and crust. Bake 20 to 22 minutes or until topping is bubbly and golden, remove from oven. Immediately sprinkle milk chocolate chips over top; press gently onto surface. Cool completely in pan on wire rack. Cut into bars (about 36).
Toffee Topping:
In a small saucepan, combine 2/3 cup butter and 1/3 cup packed light brown sugar. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until mixture comes to a boil. Continue boiling, stirring constantly for 30 seconds. Use immediately.
